annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under NRS 99.040 — 8.75% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Nevada’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-07-09; verify at leg.state.nv.us. Not legal advice.
